title: Sulcorebutia menesesii
taxonomy: Sulcorebutia menesesii is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Cactaceae. It is native to Bolivia, specifically in the Santa Cruz Department. Within the Cactaceae family, Sulcorebutia menesesii is part of the subfamily Cactoideae. The genus Sulcorebutia is a group of small cacti plants, and Sulcorebutia menesesii is one of its many species. The classification of Sulcorebutia menesesii is subject to ongoing research in the field of botany and taxonomy.

The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which may help to soothe skin irritations, reduce oxidative stress, and combat infections.
